businesses.name: Amuri Boyz Entertainment
businesses.description:
Amuri Boyz deliver more than music — they deliver a full Island experience.

Known for their powerful live sound, smooth harmonies, and unmatched crowd connection, Amuri Boyz bring authentic Cook Islands flavour 🇨🇰 to every stage they step on. Whether it’s an intimate celebration or a major event, they create moments people remember long after the night ends.

Perfect For:

🎤 Weddings
🎉 Birthdays
💍 Engagements
🏢 Corporate Functions
🏝 Island Nights
🎓 Graduations
🎶 Festivals & Community Events
businesses.short_description: Bringing Island Vibes. Real Energy. Unforgettable Nights.

businesses.name: Tangata Whenua Carving
businesses.description:
Te Rangimarie (T) is a lifelong Māori carver and artist whose work carries deep cultural knowledge, history, and passion. Based at the Ōtara Markets every Saturday, T has been carving for as long as he can remember — starting with trees in his own backyard and now working on his current major project: a traditional waka.

Carving is not a hobby for T. It is his calling. Every spare moment is spent bringing new pieces to life, each one carved by hand with meaning and intention. Alongside his carvings, T also creates Māori drawings and crochet bags, and holds an extensive personal portfolio of designs.

T does not take custom orders — his work is created from inspiration, not instruction. What he carves is what becomes available. All pieces are first in, first served, and every artwork is unique.

About T

T was one of the talented Māori artists involved in the 2009 carving of a waharoa (gateway) for Northcross Intermediate School. The waharoa, carved alongside fellow Māori artists, stands as a symbol of identity, learning, and connection — welcoming students, whānau, and the wider community onto the school grounds.

This project reflects T’s commitment to preserving and expressing Māori culture through carving, and his belief that art is not only something to be admired, but something that carries responsibility, story, and mana.
businesses.short_description: Carving stories of whenua, whakapapa, and tradition

businesses.name: Island Pepe
businesses.description:
Island Pepe is a family-founded Pasifika brand created with one heartfelt purpose: to preserve and share Pacific language and culture with the next generation.

Rooted in a rich heritage spanning multiple regions of the South Pacific, Island Pepe designs meaningful everyday essentials for babies and children — from clothing and blankets to books and gift sets. Each piece is thoughtfully created to reflect the languages, stories, and traditions passed down by our ancestors, helping parents build lasting cultural connections at home.

More than a brand, Island Pepe is a celebration of identity, belonging, and pride. Through respectful collaboration with native speakers and cultural contributors across the Pacific, every design honours authenticity, storytelling, and community.

Island Pepe welcomes everyone — Pasifika and non-Pasifika alike — to share in this journey of preserving culture, nurturing identity, and creating memories that children will carry with them for life.
businesses.short_description: Passing Culture to the Next Generation

businesses.name: Steam Pudding Lady
businesses.description:
Steamed Pudding Lady is a home-made dessert business dedicated to bringing comfort, nostalgia, and joy through freshly made steamed puddings.

Each pudding is carefully prepared in small batches using simple ingredients and time-honoured methods, creating rich, comforting flavours that feel like home. From family gatherings to special occasions, Steamed Pudding Lady's desserts are made to be shared warm, generous, and full of heart.

Rooted in care, consistency, and a genuine love for feeding people well, this is comfort food done properly. No shortcuts. No mass production. Just honest desserts made with intention, perfect for those moments when only something truly comforting will do.
businesses.short_description: Steam Puddings

businesses.name: David Laumatia Art
businesses.description:
Where Pacific art is brought to life through innovative 3D mixed media.

David's creations honour Samoan culture, evoking cherished memories and a deep sense of pride. With each piece, he captures a powerful connection to his homeland — expressing both identity and a heartfelt longing to return to his roots.

Today, David's work is shared and celebrated across the world.
businesses.short_description: Art that carries the soul of Samoa

businesses.name: Anarra Alofa Est.2020
businesses.description:
Talofa lava, my name is Sharon, co-founder and owner of Anarra Alofa.
My creative journey began in 2020, when I first set my heart on making handcrafted board signs. Shortly after, I welcomed my first child — my son — and, like many mothers, I placed that dream on hold. Even so, the desire to create never left me.

Over time, my inspiration naturally returned through Sei — the floral ear pieces deeply loved and worn by Samoan women. In our culture, Sei are more than adornment; they are expressions of beauty, identity, and pride. The idea of creating them stayed with me, quietly growing until the time felt right.

At the beginning of last year, I finally took the step to bring Anarra Alofa to life. Starting small and working with minimal materials, I began handcrafting Sei with love, care, and intention. What started as a simple creative outlet has grown into a heartfelt small business rooted in culture, creativity, and passion.

Anarra Alofa is a reflection of my journey — as a mother, a Samoan woman, and a creator — and a celebration of the beauty we carry and share through our culture.
businesses.short_description: Elevate your style with beautifully crafted Sei's for every occasion at Anarra Alofa.

businesses.name: M.Steven
businesses.description:
This artist brings worlds to life through intricate, hand-drawn line work, creating pieces that feel both deeply personal and endlessly expansive. Every artwork is built stroke by stroke — layering symbols, creatures, and flowing forms that invite the viewer to slow down and discover something new each time they look.

Inspired by storytelling, movement, and the complexity of lived experience, their work blends fine detail with raw expression. Using acrylic paint and acrylic pen alongside traditional drawing tools, each piece carries its own rhythm — reflecting patience, discipline, and a deep respect for the creative process.

Beyond visual art, this same care and creativity extend into handcrafted desserts and custom celebration cakes, including wedding and birthday designs. Whether expressed on paper, canvas, or through edible art, the artist approaches every creation with the same intention: balance, beauty, and meaning.

These works are never rushed — they are thoughtfully crafted, allowing ideas to unfold naturally. The result is a body of work that feels alive and grounded, celebrating creativity as a form of meditation, expression, and connection across many mediums.
businesses.short_description: Stories in Every Intricate Stroke & Sweet Creation

businesses.name: NEST Interiors
businesses.description:
We are dreamers, doers, and collaborators who bring bold ideas to life through purposeful design.

Our Pacific roots remind us that creativity is a gift, excellence is a responsibility, and progress is something we achieve together. We design with heart, we act with intention, and we always move forward as one — with our clients, our teams, and the people we serve.
businesses.short_description: Full Interior Design Service
businesses.address: 593 Te Rapa Road, Level 1, Mayfair Business Centre

businesses.name: L'ame Du Pareu by Vai'ohani
businesses.description:
Discover the magic of pareo art with Vaihere in beautiful Raiatea. In this hands-on workshop, you'll learn the traditional craft of painting your own pareo, using colours and patterns that reflect your personal story.

Choose from three experience levels:
🎨 Child's Pareo (3 hrs) — A fun, creative session perfect for young artists.
🎨 Guided Design (3 hrs) — Vaihere sketches your chosen idea, and you bring it to life with paint.
🎨 Create Your Own (4 hrs) — Design and paint your own pareo from scratch.

All materials are included — just bring yourself and your creativity, and leave with a beautiful handmade pareo to take home. A meaningful and memorable activity for both locals and visitors.

Découvrez la magie de l'art du pareo avec Vaihere sur la magnifique île de Raiatea. Lors de cet atelier créatif et immersif, vous apprendrez à peindre votre propre pareo en utilisant des couleurs et des motifs qui racontent votre histoire personnelle.

Choisissez parmi trois niveaux d'expérience :
🎨 Pareo Enfant (3h) — Une activité amusante et créative, idéale pour les jeunes artistes.
🎨 Design Guidé (3h) — Vaihere dessine le motif de votre choix, et vous lui donnez vie avec la peinture.
🎨 Créez Votre Propre Motif (4h) — Concevez et peignez votre pareo de A à Z.

Tout le matériel est fourni — il vous suffit d'apporter votre créativité et vous repartirez avec un pareo unique, réalisé de vos propres mains. Une expérience
businesses.short_description: A hands-on pareu painting experience in Raiatea

businesses.name: Warrior Lines Tattoo
businesses.description:
Warrior Lines Tattoo is a veteran-owned tattoo studio built on discipline, respect, and the belief that great art comes from a strong, healthy environment.

We specialise in bold black and grey work, custom designs, and Polynesian-inspired tattoos that carry meaning, structure, and story.

This is a no-nonsense shop for artists and clients who value integrity, craftsmanship, and authenticity. We reject ego, drama, and gatekeeping, and instead foster a space where artists are encouraged to grow, sharpen their skills, and take pride in their work — without judgment or pressure.

At Warrior Lines Tattoo, tattooing is more than ink. It's commitment. It's brotherhood. It's honouring the past while building something stronger for the future — one line at a time.
businesses.short_description: Polynesian-inspired Art and Tattoo Studio

businesses.name: Pacificana
businesses.description:
Pacificana is a proudly Papua New Guinea–owned creative studio bringing the vibrant spirit of the Pacific to life through handcrafted floral art. Every piece is inspired by the colours of our islands, the strength of our women, and the traditions passed down through generations.

Each handmade bloom is carefully shaped, painted, and detailed with love — transforming iconic Pacific flowers into stunning wearable art for everyday joy, cultural events, weddings, and island celebrations.

Pacificana is more than an accessories brand — it is a celebration of identity. A way for our people to express who we are, wherever we are in the world. Bold, colourful, authentic, and proudly PNG.

From bright hibiscus and frangipani to custom colourways, every design reflects the warmth, resilience, and creativity of our Pacific community.

Wear your culture. Celebrate your roots. Bloom boldly with Pacificana.
businesses.short_description: PNG Beauty, Crafted by Hand

businesses.name: Beautyby2
businesses.description:
Beautyby2 is a nail artistry studio dedicated to creating beautifully detailed, modern nail designs that celebrate individuality and self-expression. Each set is carefully crafted with precision, creativity, and a genuine love for the art of nails.

From soft, elegant styles to bold statement designs, Beautyby2 focuses on enhancing natural beauty while delivering a personalised experience for every client. Every detail matters — because great nails aren't just an accessory; they're a reflection of confidence and care.

Discover nail artistry created with passion, patience, and purpose at Beautyby2.
businesses.short_description: Nail enhancement

businesses.name: Avalon Wellness and Performance
businesses.description:
Avalon Wellness & Performance is a holistic health clinic dedicated to helping people move better, feel stronger, and live with greater ease and confidence. Through personalised, hands-on care, Avalon supports recovery, long-term wellness, and peak physical performance.

The clinic takes an integrative approach to treatment, combining techniques such as Active Release Technique (ART), Osteopathic Manual Therapy, Cranial Sacral Therapy, and therapeutic massage. Each session is tailored to the individual, addressing not only symptoms but the underlying causes of pain, tension, and movement restrictions.

At Avalon, the body is viewed as a connected system. Treatment plans are developed through careful assessment and collaboration, ensuring care aligns with each client's goals — whether that's injury recovery, pain management, improved mobility, or enhanced athletic performance.

Avalon Wellness & Performance provides a calm, professional environment where expertise and compassion come together. From deep tissue and mobility-focused work to gentle therapies that support nervous system balance and stress relief, every session is delivered with intention and care.

More than treatment, Avalon empowers clients with the tools, support, and knowledge needed to maintain their wellbeing long after their session ends — helping them move forward feeling stronger, balanced, and supported.
businesses.short_description: Move Better. Feel Better. Live Better.
businesses.address: 10661 Airport Pulling Road N #10, Naples FL 34109

businesses.name: VAHINE CHIC
businesses.description:
Vahine Chic is a celebration of Polynesian artistry — handmade creations crafted with patience, passion, and the timeless beauty of our islands.

From their home in Tahiti, each piece is made with love, blending vibrant colours, natural textures, and traditional inspiration to honour the spirit of Fenua. Their work reflects more than craftsmanship; it carries stories of family, culture, and connection.

Whether it's a lovingly woven accessory or a delicately detailed piece of décor, every item invites you to discover the treasures of Fenua and the warmth of the people who create them.

At Vahine Chic, artistry is not just a skill — it is a way of sharing joy. A way of keeping culture alive. A way of bringing a little piece of paradise into everyday life.
businesses.short_description: Made In Tahiti
businesses.address: Marche de Papeete, pres de l'escalator (Papeete Market - near the escalator)

businesses.name: Rebalance Qi Acupuncture
businesses.description:
Rebalance Qi Acupuncture is a calming and supportive clinic
based in Papatoetoe, South Auckland. Our mission is to help
individuals restore balance and feel their best through the natural
healing principles of traditional Chinese medicine. We believe
wellness is not one-size-fits-all that's why each treatment is
thoughtfully tailored to suit your individual needs. We offer
personalized acupuncture sessions, cupping therapy, and holistic
care in a space designed to help you feel grounded, relaxed, and
heard. As an ACC-registered provider, we also make acupuncture
more accessible for those recovering from injuries. At Rebalance
Qi, your health and well-being are our top priority. We're here to
support you on your journey toward lasting relief and renewed
energy.
businesses.short_description: Restore, Renew, Rebalance.

Monday - 9:30am-6:30pm

Wednesday	9:30am-6:30pm

Friday - 9:30am-2pm

businesses.name: Jztamakaandkickz
businesses.description:
We are a small shoe cleaning business. For over 4 years, we have cleaned and conditioned shoes from sneakers to boots to your everyday beaters.
We have done shoes for Charlie Pomee from 3hd & also ex all black Karl Tuinukuafe. Just to name afew. We're happy to clean any of shoe and save the from the landfill. Give us a try today. You won't be disappointed. JT&K
businesses.short_description: Want your shoes cleaned? Say Less!
businesses.business_hours:
Monday to Friday
Weekend Closed (Unless Arranged)

businesses.name: Pacific Stain
businesses.description:
Pacific Stain is the creative expression of a Samoan family dedicated to honouring and preserving the stories of their ancestors. Through intricate 3D mixed media, pyrography, traditional motifs, and handcrafted wooden creations, they bring Polynesian culture to life — piece by piece.

Every artwork carries the mana of Polynesian heritage, blending ancestral knowledge with modern craftsmanship. From carved bowls and decorative panels to symbolic designs inspired by tatau and natural elements, Pacific Stain celebrates identity, memory, and the deep connection between people and their roots.

Driven by a passion to share Polynesian art with the world, Pacific Stain creates pieces that are not only visually striking but spiritually meaningful — art that speaks, remembers, and continues the legacy of Polynesia.
businesses.short_description: Carving the Spirit of Samoa

businesses.name: Angela Malakai | The HONESTea
businesses.description:
About The HONESTea

The HONESTea is where real conversations finally happen.

Hosted by Angela Malakai — Speaker, Author, and Holistic Trauma Coach — this podcast is built on truth, voice, and lived experience.

This is more than a podcast; it's the foundation of a speaking platform rooted in honesty, healing, and authentic human connection.

We pour the tea that matters — the trauma tea, the growth tea, the spiritual tea, the identity tea, and everything in between.

It's a space for cycle-breakers, leaders, deep feelers, and those who know they were made for more.

🎙 HONESTea Podcast — Available to watch on YouTube.
businesses.short_description: Speaker | Author | Podcast Host | Holistic Trauma & Elevation Coach | Conscious Relationship Work | Trauma-Informed Leadership & Mindset Integration

businesses.name: The Artwork of Dave Sotogi
businesses.description:
Dave Sotogi is a New Zealand artist whose work brings the heart of the Pacific to life through rich symbolism, cultural depth, and emotive portraiture. His paintings blend modern artistry with ancestral influence, honouring the beauty, strength, and stories of Pacific people.

From striking portraits to symbolic, nature-inspired works, each piece reflects Dave's deep connection to heritage, identity, and the lands and waters that shape us. His art captures moments of reflection, power, and serenity — inviting viewers to feel, remember, and connect.

Today, Dave's work is celebrated in homes across Aotearoa and around the world, available as premium canvas prints and carefully crafted wall art. Every creation carries a story, a spirit, and a sense of belonging — an invitation to experience Pacific art through a contemporary lens.
businesses.short_description: Contemporary Maori Art in Motion

businesses.name: SILILO TATTOO
businesses.description:
SILLO TATTOO is a Polynesian tattoo artist whose work is deeply influenced by traditional patterns, structure, and the cultural meaning carried within every line.

Each tattoo is approached with intention and respect, not simply as a design, but as a personal story expressed through Polynesian-inspired motifs, balance, and flow. From large-scale body pieces to detailed custom work, SILLO TATTOO focuses on clean execution, strong composition, and designs that honour both the wearer and the cultural origins of the art.

Based in Avignon, France, SILLO TATTOO works by appointment, creating custom tattoos for clients who value authenticity, symbolism, and craftsmanship. Every piece is thoughtfully designed to fit the body naturally, ensuring the tattoo remains timeless, powerful, and meaningful.

At SILLO TATTOO, tattooing is more than decoration, it is identity, respect, and storytelling through ink.
businesses.short_description: Polynesian Tattoo Artist

businesses.name: Papua New Guinea Bilums and Baskets
businesses.description:
Papua New Guinea Bilums & Baskets, run by CJ & LJ Mountford and based in Bundaberg, Queensland, is a small family business dedicated to sharing authentic Papua New Guinea arts and crafts with the wider community.

Specialising in traditional bilums and handwoven baskets, each piece is created using techniques passed down through generations. Bilums are traditionally crafted by women, woven in a variety of shapes and sizes to serve different purposes — from everyday use to baby carrying. The baskets are traditionally crafted by men, reflecting distinct cultural roles and knowledge systems.

Only three provinces in Papua New Guinea continue this specific weaving tradition:

North Solomon (Buka)
Southern Highlands
Eastern Highlands

These handcrafted pieces are both functional and meaningful, suitable for home décor, shopping, picnics, and baby carrying — while carrying the stories, skills, and heritage of the communities who make them.

By supporting Papua New Guinea Bilums & Baskets, you are helping preserve traditional knowledge and create income opportunities for PNG artisans.
businesses.short_description: CJ & LJ Mountford

businesses.name: Te Mauri o te Makawe
businesses.description:
Nuku te manaaki, nuku te manaaki, ka ora ai te iwi.
With your support and my support, our community will thrive.

My name is Iesha Te-Iho. I am a qualified barber, creative, and proud Waiuku local. My journey here was not a straight line — but every challenge sharpened my purpose and showed me that barbering could be more than a trade. It could be a doorway to healing.

From that understanding, Te Mauri o te Makawe: The Koha Manawa was born.

This kaupapa delivers professional grooming and braiding through a mobile service, reaching people and places often overlooked — hospices, spinal units, rehabilitation centres, and rural communities where transport and access are barriers. But this work is about far more than hair.

Through whakahoki te tapu, hair is treated with care and respectfully returned to Papatūānuku using traditional tikanga — uku (clay), harakeke (flax), and korowai — protecting the mana of our whānau. Alongside this, kōrero is shared and recorded, preserving the voices, stories, and heartbeat of the community.

This kaupapa began with one chair and one set of tools, but the vision is a Waka Wānanga — a collective of skilled creatives travelling across Aotearoa and beyond, delivering workshops, teaching tikanga, uplifting hauora, and restoring identity through creativity.

At its heart, this is about legacy. About building something that lasts — not just 100 years, but for generations — by caring for people, culture, and community, together.
businesses.short_description: Any Style. Any Hair. Any Where.

businesses.name: SenseAI
businesses.description:
SenseAI is a supportive space for your thoughts, feelings, and ideas — without judgment, pressure, or noise.

Life can be complex, and sometimes you just need help making sense of what's in your head. SenseAI blends journaling with compassionate AI guidance to help you reflect, gain perspective, and move forward with confidence.

It's like having a thoughtful companion who listens, understands, and helps you see things more clearly.
businesses.short_description: AI-Powered Journaling App - Type It, Speak It, Scan It

businesses.name: Oceanique Solutions
businesses.description:
Oceanique DMC & Consulting:
Your Premier Destination Management (DMC) and tailored business consultancy. We offer unmatched expertise, seamless event planning and execution. With a deep insight into local culture and attention to detail, we guarantee a spectacular experience. Let us handle the details so you can immerse yourself in the adventure.

Choose Oceanique Solutions for an experience as smooth as the sound of waves lapping the shore, the touch of gentle breeze, the sight of vibrant sunset, the scent of fresh rain, and the taste of a perfectly crafted meal.

Oceanique Travel:
As seasoned travel professionals, Oceanique - is your one stop travel shop. From island retreats to cultural experiences, we ensure your travels are unforgettable, allowing you to relish every sun-kissed moment.

Oceanique Education:
Our education services forge strong partnerships with top educational institutions, immigration agent, and schools in New Zealand. We are a partnered Tahitian International Education Agency and engage as a Learning & Development Contractor. Our mission is to offer enriching educational experiences that connect cultures and unlock global opportunities.

Join us, and let's embark on a new learning adventure together.
businesses.short_description: Destination Management, Travel Consulting & Professional Services

businesses.name: Tuhono Design
businesses.description: Tuhono Design was created by Jay and Sarah, a proud Maori whanau dedicated to revitalising te reo Maori in everyday spaces. Inspired by their own journeys of reconnecting with their heritage, they design bilingual planners, calendars, prints, and educational resources that make Maori language and culture accessible, beautiful, and part of daily life. Their kaupapa is built on whanaungatanga, kotahitanga, and uplifting the next generation so they can grow up confident in their identity. Through thoughtfully crafted products rooted in meaning and connection, Tuhono Design invites whanau everywhere to learn, speak, and live te reo Maori with pride.
businesses.short_description: Bilingual Maori Resources to Inspire, Learn & Connect

businesses.name: Pacifikmarket.nc
businesses.description:
Pacifikmarket.nc is a vibrant Pacific-led platform based in Nouvelle-Calédonie, dedicated to celebrating, showcasing, and uplifting Pacific designers, artisans, and creative talent from across the region.

More than a marketplace, Pacifikmarket.nc is a cultural movement — bringing together fashion shows, artisan markets, creative collaborations, and community events that highlight the richness, diversity, and contemporary expression of Pacific identity. From traditional craftsmanship to modern Pacific fashion, each piece and event tells a story of heritage, pride, and innovation.

Pacifikmarket.nc creates meaningful opportunities for Pacific creatives to be seen, supported, and celebrated — locally and internationally — while building strong connections between cultures, generations, and islands.

Through fashion, storytelling, and community-driven events, Pacifikmarket.nc continues to amplify Pacific voices and create spaces where culture thrives.
businesses.short_description: Kanak and Pasifika Designs

businesses.name: Mana Carvings
businesses.description:
Mana Carvings is a celebration of Cook Islands heritage, storytelling, and craftsmanship. Every piece — whether carved on wood, engraved on drinkware, or designed for the home — carries deep cultural meaning, ancestral patterns, and the spirit of mana.

Each artwork is handcrafted with precision and intention, transforming traditional motifs into modern, functional pieces that honour identity and connection. From symbolic creatures to intricate Polynesian designs, every creation holds a story — one that reflects culture, legacy, and the pride of the Pacific.

Made with heart and guided by tradition, Mana Carvings exists to keep our stories alive, one handcrafted design at a time.
businesses.short_description: Handcrafted with Culture, Carved with Mana

businesses.name: Zeena Khan Coaching
businesses.description:
Zeena Khan Coaching stands at the intersection of modern leadership and cultural wisdom, offering a nuanced approach to professional development.

With a focus on empowering leaders to build agile and confident teams, Zeena's coaching practice is particularly attuned to the complexities of the AI era. Her methodology is grounded in a strengths-based framework that encourages individuals to harness their unique capabilities while remaining culturally aware.

Zeena Khan brings a wealth of experience to her coaching engagements, drawing from her own heritage and understanding of diverse cultural perspectives. This blend of insight ensures that her clients are not only prepared to meet the challenges of today's fast-paced business environment but are also equipped to lead with empathy and respect for the diverse backgrounds within their teams.

At the core of Zeena's practice is the belief that true leadership is about fostering an environment where all team members can thrive. By emphasizing cultural awareness and personal strengths, she helps leaders create workplaces that are both innovative and inclusive. Zeena Khan Coaching is dedicated to nurturing leadership that is as dynamic as the world around us, with a commitment to guiding professionals towards their highest potential.
businesses.short_description: Empowering leaders to foster agile, confident teams in the AI era.

businesses.name: Da Utah Taro Leaf Man
businesses.description:
Da Utah Taro Leaf Man bridges Hawaiʻi and Utah by delivering fresh, island-grown taro leaves straight to families who crave the real thing.

We know that taro leaves aren't just ingredients — they're tradition, celebration, and identity. That's why we source directly from Hawaiʻi farms and ship weekly to ensure freshness and quality you can trust.

This isn't just produce.
This is culture in a bag.
businesses.short_description: From Our Farms to Your Arms

businesses.name: DAN KAS Construction
businesses.description:
Dan Kas Construction is an Auckland-based building company built on hard work, attention to detail, and a genuine commitment to quality workmanship. Led by a skilled Samoan crew, the team brings values of service, care, and collective strength into every project, delivering work with integrity and pride.

Specialising in new builds, renovations, decking, fencing, recladding, and general maintenance, Dan Kas Construction provides reliable, well-crafted solutions designed to last. Each project is approached with a focus on durability, functionality, and clean, professional finishes, ensuring results that are both practical and visually appealing.

Known throughout Auckland for their strong work ethic, clear communication, and fair, competitive pricing, the team works closely with clients to make every build a collaborative and stress-free experience. Client ideas are respected and combined with expert guidance to achieve outcomes that balance vision with craftsmanship.

More than just construction, Dan Kas Construction is about building long-term relationships and creating homes and structures that support families and communities. Whether upgrading an existing space or starting a new build, the team brings precision, reliability, and Pacific heart to every stage of the journey.
businesses.short_description: Built on Trust, Crafted by Community

businesses.name: NAUNA
businesses.description:
Nauna is a vibrant creative and cultural brand based in Apia, Samoa, celebrated for its authentic elei fashion and Pacific-inspired designs. Rooted in Samoan artistry and storytelling, Nauna showcases clothing and creative expressions that reflect contemporary Pacific identity while honouring traditional patterns and aesthetics.

Known for its bold, beautiful pieces and strong community engagement, Nauna has built a dedicated following by blending island heritage with modern style, making traditional influences accessible and wearable for everyday life. Whether through fashion, creative content, or collaborations with local artists, Nauna is a cultural voice that elevates Pacific design and celebrates Samoan creative excellence.
businesses.short_description: Authentic Elei - Made in Samoa

businesses.name: Paulo Mauia
businesses.description:
Arts Finest Tattoo Shop, owned and led by Paulo Mauia, is a respected Samoan tattoo studio known for delivering finely detailed, culturally grounded tattoo work with skill, care, and integrity.

Specialising in Samoan and Polynesian tattoo designs, Paulo brings years of experience and a deep understanding of traditional patterns, symbolism, and placement. Each piece is carefully crafted to reflect identity, story, and cultural pride — whether through bold traditional work, custom designs, or finely executed modern pieces.

Arts Finest Tattoo Shop is more than a place to get tattooed; it is a space where art, heritage, and craftsmanship come together. With a strong reputation across Samoa and New Zealand — and expanding to Australia from January 2026 — the studio continues to serve clients who value authenticity, cultural respect, and high-quality tattooing.
businesses.short_description: Arts Finest

businesses.name: Good Day Catering
businesses.description:
Good-Day Catering is a Hamilton-based Pacific catering business proudly serving fresh, authentic Polynesian food for community gatherings, church events, pop-ups, and special occasions.

Rooted in service and connection, Good-Day Catering is known for generous portions, traditional flavours, and food made with care — whether it’s for a church function, cultural celebration, or local market pop-up. Every dish is prepared with love, respect for culture, and a strong sense of community.

From beautifully presented desserts to hearty Pacific favourites, Good-Day Catering brings people together through food that feels like home.
businesses.short_description: Samoan takeaway and catering for Pacific Island Communities

businesses.name: Inailau
businesses.description:
Inailau Business Women's Network is a community-driven platform dedicated to uplifting, connecting, and empowering Pacific women in business.

Rooted in collaboration and collective growth, Inailau creates safe, supportive spaces where women can share knowledge, build confidence, and grow both personally and professionally. Through networking events, workshops, mentoring sessions, and global connections, Inailau supports Pacific women entrepreneurs at every stage of their journey — from early ideas to established businesses.

The network champions visibility, leadership, and economic empowerment, recognising that when Pacific women rise, families, communities, and future generations rise with them.

More than a business network, Inailau is a movement grounded in culture, connection, and purpose — bringing Pacific women together to reflect, realign, and rise together.
businesses.short_description: Business Women's Network

businesses.name: Aki Store
businesses.description:
Our name combines two Māori terms: “ā” and “ki.” Together, they symbolise the idea of possessing direction — guiding ownership of your space with purpose and intention. It reflects our belief that the environments we live and work in should empower us, not just surround us. Through meaningful décor, we help you shape spaces that feel aligned, intentional, and uniquely yours.

Aki Store is proudly owned by VAKA, a 3D printing company committed to igniting a new wave of everyday entrepreneurs. Our team of Māori and Pasifika creatives, born and raised in South Auckland, are driven by a shared mission: to inspire you to become the curator of your own home.

We understand that home is more than a physical space. It is a sanctuary for creativity, comfort, and connection.

Our collection blends cultural aesthetics with modern minimalism, allowing each piece to harmonise effortlessly with any interior style. Every design is created to transform your environment into a reflection of who you are — grounded in culture, elevated through simplicity.

Our goal is simple: to empower you to embrace your individuality and reimagine your living and working spaces.

Join us on this journey of self-expression and transformation. Let us help you elevate your space with pieces designed to inspire.

businesses.description:
SaaSy Cookies is a digital product studio and infrastructure partner for founders, creators, and growing businesses.

As the exclusive technology partner behind Pacific Market, we design and manage the systems that power visibility, credibility, and growth for Pacific-owned businesses across the platform.

We don’t just build websites.
We build managed website and funnel infrastructure — combining clean design, automation, AI tools, and scalable systems that help founders operate professionally and grow sustainably.

Our work includes:

• Custom website design and development
• Funnel strategy and automation
• AI-powered tools and digital products
• Business-ready resources (invoices, QR systems, digital assets)
• Listing optimisation and technical support for Pacific Market vendors

From first-time founders to established brands, we build the backend structure that allows businesses to move with clarity and confidence.

Our mission is simple:
Build systems that work.
Remove tech overwhelm.
Strengthen the Pacific digital economy.
